attributes.promotionalText: Camera contracts for avoided tasks. Free: 3 contracts/day. Pro: unlimited contracts, stricter modes, more brutal voices. All camera logic is offline. Nothing leaves your iPhone.
attributes.description:
Done in 5 is for that one task you keep putting off — a strict 5-minute camera contract that forces you to finally start.

Point your phone at your face, type the thing you're avoiding, and don't leave until it's started.

All camera logic is offline. Nothing leaves your iPhone.

FREE TIER:
- 3 contracts per day
- 5-minute camera contracts
- Away voice accountability

PRO ($29 one-time):
- Unlimited contracts
- Stricter modes
- More brutal voices
- Full history and progress tracking
- 100% offline privacy

Done in 5 is a tiny tool you only use for those moments when you're staring at the task and can't start. It's brutal. It works.
attributes.keywords: procrastination,avoidance,ADHD focus,body doubling,accountability camera,send email,focus timer
